emails.subject: Legal EOL Database
emails.body: Legal EOL Database FYI, I have a database where I keep track of my online approvals/declines and reasons why (if there are any!). I don't know to what extent Frank ever looked at it, but you might find it helpful. It is called "ENA Legal Online Trading Agreements" database. If you're interested, I'll ask Mike Neves to get you access.

emails.subject: Re: Legal EOL Database
emails.body: Re: Legal EOL Database Yes, I would like to have access. Please ask Mike to email me once he's given me access. Thank you. From: Tana Jones on 09/27/2000 10:13 AM
